'''Mon Torri''' was a snowy, mountainous and glacier-covered [[Planet/Legends|world]] that was located within the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Situated between [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] and [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], it was surrounded by seven rings, each of them a different color and composition.

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], the [[Eradicator (Imperial-class)|''Eradicator'']] was in the process of impounding a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] near Mon Torri when the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] came out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].<ref name="Scoundrel's Luck">''[[Scoundrel's Luck]]''</ref>
